_comment: NPC: Da Niu (大牛). Canon ID: N152. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Da Niu

perception_tiers.mortal: Wang Lin's childhood friend; strong farmhand

note: Childhood friend; represents the mortal life Wang Lin left behind

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Eh heh! Wang Lin! Come help me carry these logs. You are smarter than me, but I am stronger — we make a good team!
I heard there are spirit beasts in the mountains east of here. My grandfather said he saw one forty years ago. Want to go look?
The village elder says we should stay close to home before the aptitude test. But I am not afraid. What is the worst that could happen?

sect_tasks.description: Da Niu grins broadly: 'Eh heh! I want to go fishing at the river, but the last time I went alone, a wild beast chased me back! Come with me — bring coal for a campfire and I will share whatever we catch!'
Da Niu flexes his thin arms: 'My grandfather says a real man can carry his own weight in logs! Help me bring oak logs to the carpenter and he might give us something good.'

desires.what: Suggest exploring the eastern mountains for spirit beasts
desires.why: My grandfather saw a spirit beast there forty years ago. I want to see one too. An adventure would break the boredom.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1. Da Niu's initiation line: 'I heard there are spirit beasts in the mountains east of here. My grandfather said he saw one forty years ago.' A curious, brave young man would want to explore.
desires.line: Come on! Let us go to the eastern mountains. My grandfather said there are spirit beasts there. What if we actually find one? It would be the greatest story ever told in this village!

desires.what: Boast about physical strength and challenge someone to a contest
desires.why: I am the strongest in the village. It is simple fact. People should know this.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1. Da Niu is 'simple, strong, loyal farmhand.' His initiation line: 'I am stronger.' A simple, strong young man would brag and challenge. Universal behavior for his archetype.
desires.line: I carried twelve logs yesterday. Twelve! No one else in this village can do that. I bet I could carry you and the logs at the same time. Come, try to lift this one. Go on!

desires.what: Ask about the upcoming Heng Yue Sect aptitude test
desires.why: Everyone is talking about it. I want to know what happens if they choose me. Would I have to leave? I do not want to leave... but I want to see what is out there.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1. The Heng Yue aptitude test is the central event of early Wang Lin's life. Da Niu, as his friend, would be curious and nervous. Per Art XXXI.3: a player hearing this from a friend, not a quest giver, accidentally recreates the atmosphere.
desires.line: Do you think the Heng Yue elder will really come? What if they test me and I pass? Would I have to leave the village forever? I do not want to leave... but I also want to see what is beyond these fields.

desires.what: Report seeing wolves near the village outskirts
desires.why: I saw tracks this morning near the eastern tree line. If wolves are coming closer, people should know.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1. Wolves are a recurring threat to the village. Da Niu, who wanders the outskirts daily, would be the first to notice tracks. This creates the 'restless wolves' beat from Art XXXI.3.
desires.line: I saw wolf tracks this morning. Fresh ones, right by the eastern tree line. Three sets, maybe four. They are getting closer to the village. We should tell the elder.
